sentences.target: Im Schach beschütze ich meinen König.

translations.de: Im Schach beschütze ich meinen König.
translations.en: I protect my king in chess.
translations.es: En el ajedrez protejo a mi rey.
translations.fr: Aux échecs, je protège mon roi.
translations.it: A scacchi proteggo il mio re.
translations.zh-Hans: 在国际象棋中，我保护我的王。
translations.yue: 喺國際象棋入面，我會保護我嘅王。
translations.ru: В шахматах я защищаю своего короля.
translations.he: בשחמט אני מגן על המלך שלי.
translations.vi: Trong cờ vua tôi bảo vệ vua của mình.
translations.nl: Bij schaken bescherm ik mijn koning.
translations.uk: У шахах я захищаю свого короля.
translations.hi: शतरंज में मैं अपने राजा की रक्षा करता हूँ.
translations.el: Στο σκάκι προστατεύω τον βασιλιά μου.
translations.nb: I sjakk beskytter jeg kongen min.
translations.sv: I schack skyddar jag min kung.
translations.da: I skak beskytter jeg min konge.
translations.ja: チェスでは自分のキングを守る。

tokens.explanation: Contracted preposition + article (in + dem); introduces a dative PP setting the domain/context.
Head noun of the PP governed by 'im'; dative singular (neuter), denotes the game/domain.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; occupies verb-second position.
Personal pronoun, nominative singular, 1st person; subject of the clause.
Possessive determiner agreeing with 'König' (accusative masculine singular).
Direct object (accusative masculine singular) of 'beschütze'.

sentences.target: Die Kinder malen einen König mit Krone.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈmaːlən ˈaɪ̯nən ˈkøːnɪç mɪt ˈkʁoːnə/

translations.de: Die Kinder malen einen König mit Krone.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈmaːlən ˈaɪ̯nən ˈkøːnɪç mɪt ˈkʁoːnə/
translations.en: The kids are drawing a king with a crown.
translations.es: Los niños dibujan a un rey con corona.
translations.fr: Les enfants dessinent un roi avec une couronne.
translations.it: I bambini disegnano un re con una corona.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们画一个戴皇冠的国王。
translations.yue: 啲小朋友畫戴皇冠嘅國王。
translations.pt: As crianças desenham um rei com coroa.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ đang vẽ một ông vua đội vương miện.
translations.nl: De kinderen tekenen een koning met een kroon.
translations.hi: बच्चे ताज वाला राजा बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά ζωγραφίζουν έναν βασιλιά με στέμμα.
translations.nb: Barna tegner en konge med krone.
translations.id: Anak-anak menggambar seorang raja dengan mahkota.
translations.sv: Barnen ritar en kung med en krona.
translations.ro: Copiii desenează un rege cu coroană.
translations.da: Børnene tegner en konge med krone.
translations.fi: Lapset piirtävät kuninkaan, jolla on kruunu.
translations.ja: 子どもたちは冠をかぶった王様を描いている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of the subject 'Kinder'.
Plural noun; subject of 'malen'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; main predicate.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'König'.
Direct object (accusative masculine singular) of 'malen'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces an instrumental-like PP.
Noun (feminine), dative singular as complement of 'mit' (articleless).

sentences.target: Ich schlafe heute wie ein König.

translations.de: Ich schlafe heute wie ein König.
translations.en: I'm sleeping like a king today.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui je dors comme un roi.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我要睡得像国王一样舒服。
translations.yue: 我今日要瞓得好似國王咁。
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi ngủ ngon như vua.
translations.nl: Vandaag slaap ik als een koning.
translations.hu: Ma úgy alszom, mint egy király.
translations.hi: आज मैं राजा की तरह सो रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: I dag sover jeg som en konge.
translations.id: Hari ini aku tidur seperti raja.
translations.sv: Idag sover jag som en kung.
translations.da: I dag sover jeg som en konge.
translations.ja: 今日は王様みたいにぐっすり寝る。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular, 1st person; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Temporal adverb modifying 'schlafe'.
Comparative particle/subordinator introducing a comparison phrase.
Indefinite article, nominative masculine singular within the comparative NP.
Noun in the comparative NP ('wie ein König'); predicative-like complement expressing manner (typically nominative).

sentences.target: Papa spielt den König im Krippenspiel.

translations.de: Papa spielt den König im Krippenspiel.
translations.en: Dad plays the king in the nativity play.
translations.es: Papá hace de rey en la obra de Navidad.
translations.fr: Papa joue le roi dans la pièce de la Nativité.
translations.it: Papà fa il re nella recita della Natività.
translations.ko: 아빠는 성탄 연극에서 왕 역할을 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 爸爸在耶稣诞生剧里扮演国王。
translations.yue: 爸爸喺聖誕話劇入面演國王。
translations.ru: Папа играет роль короля в рождественской пьесе.
translations.pt: Meu pai faz o papel de rei na peça de Natal.
translations.he: אבא משחק את המלך בהצגת חג המולד.
translations.vi: Bố đóng vai nhà vua trong vở diễn Giáng Sinh.
translations.ar: أبي يؤدي دور الملك في مسرحية الميلاد.
translations.nl: Papa speelt de koning in het kerstspel.
translations.uk: Тато грає короля в різдвяній виставі.
translations.hu: Apa a királyt játssza a betlehemesben.
translations.hi: पापा क्रिसमस के नाटक में राजा की भूमिका निभाते हैं.
translations.el: Ο μπαμπάς παίζει τον ρόλο του βασιλιά στη θεατρική παράσταση της Γέννησης.
translations.id: Ayah memerankan raja dalam drama Natal.
translations.ro: Tata joacă rolul regelui în piesa Nașterii.
translations.cs: Táta hraje krále v betlémské hře.
translations.ja: お父さんは降誕劇で王様の役を演じる。

tokens.explanation: Kinship/common noun used as subject; nominative singular (definite by context).
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'König'.
Direct object of 'spielt' in the sense 'to play (the role of)'.
Contracted preposition + article (in + dem); introduces a locative dative PP.
Compound noun (neuter); dative singular as complement of 'im'.
